markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content review, finalize edits, and plan for publication.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**GP Approval Required:** The first content batch requires General Partner (GP) approval to prevent future delays. SF Three will set a 24–48 hour deadline to maintain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [**Content Edits Finalized:** Round size ranges will be removed (to avoid deterring founders), company references will be alphabetized (to show no favoritism), and all CTAs will link to the `crv.com/team` page.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [**Image Strategy Set:** Articles will launch with placeholder AI images. A full image refresh will occur after the Feb 20 rebrand, applying the new "sepia-toned" style to all published content.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [**Analytics Setup Underway:** GrowthX will build two dashboards: an LLM analytics dashboard (tracking citations, sentiment) and a Looker dashboard (tracking organic performance via GSC/GA).](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)

## Topics

### Content Review & Edits

  - [**Problem:** The first content batch is blocked pending GP approval.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Proactive approval prevents future "why did we do that?" questions and potential delays.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [**Edit Decisions:**](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
      - [**Round Size Ranges:** Remove specific dollar ranges (e.g., "$2–5M seed") from articles.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Ranges are quickly outdated by market shifts (e.g., a recent $35M Series A) and risk deterring founders raising larger rounds.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [**Company References:** Alphabetize all lists of CRV-backed companies.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Avoids the perception of favoritism among portfolio companies.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [**CTAs:** Standardize all Calls to Action.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
          - [**Link:** `crv.com/team`](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
          - [**Text:** "Reach out and get to know our team."](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Directs founders to a personal touchpoint while avoiding the spam risk of public email addresses.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
      - [**Portfolio Focus:** Prioritize references to newer, AI-focused companies (e.g., 7AI, CodeRabbit) over older ones (e.g., Zendesk).](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Ensures content feels current and relevant to today's founders.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)

### Publication & Image Strategy

  - [**Initial Publication:** Articles will launch with placeholder AI-generated images.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
      - [**Guideline:** Ensure diversity in founder imagery (e.g., include women).](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [**Post-Rebrand Refresh:** A full image refresh will occur after the Feb 20 rebrand.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
      - [**New Style:** A "sepia-toned" or "grainy" treatment, inspired by the new website's aesthetic.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
      - [**Process:** The web development team may apply the treatment, or GrowthX will source new images.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
      - [**Scope:** All previously published articles will be updated to ensure visual consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)

### Analytics & Tracking

  - [GrowthX will build two dashboards to track content performance:](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
    1.  **LLM Analytics Dashboard:** Tracks CRV's visibility in Large Language Models.
          - [**Metrics:** Visibility, sentiment, citation frequency, and answer position vs. competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
    2.  **Looker Dashboard:** Tracks organic performance from Google Search Console (GSC) and Google Analytics (GA).
          - [**Metrics:** Keyword rankings and organic traffic growth per article.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
  - [**Competitor List:** The LLM dashboard will track against the full competitor list provided by SF Three.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This provides a complete market view, including competitors with zero current LLM presence, which highlights CRV's leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**SF Three:**](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
      - [Review the final 3 articles: "What is AR?", "What is the lead investor?", and "What seed investors look for in 2026?".](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
      - [Secure GP approval for the first content batch, setting a 24–48 hour deadline.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
      - [Send the full competitor list to William via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
      - [Instruct Hassan to apply all agreed-upon edits (ranges, CTAs, alphabetization).](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
      - [Request the next 5 articles from Hassan by Wednesday morning to accommodate SF Three's travel.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
      - [Begin setup for the LLM and Looker analytics dashboards.](https://fathom.video/share/ccnE2ofo6T5ZJrUJssW1LTH-QzqENWf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
